titleZh: 在党领导下的中国公司法中少数股东保护：股东优先权与治理实践
titleEn: Corporate Governance in China: Shareholder Primacy under the Chinese Communist Party’s Influence
abstractZh: 研究中国公司法中股东优先权边界与国家治理逻辑的交互，对少数股东救济具有参考价值。
abstractEn: Examines the tension between minority protection and political governance in Chinese corporate law.
